author: dailyf1center

caption:
SIR LEWIS GOATMILTON

Lewis Hamilton secured a historic and emotional victory at the 2026 Spanish Grand Prix, marking his very first race win for Scuderia Ferrari. After starting on the front row in P2 alongside pole-sitter George Russell, Hamilton capitalized on an aggressive three-stop strategy and a perfectly timed mid-race Virtual Safety Car to leapfrog his rivals. The 41-year-old seven-time world champion put on a masterclass in tyre management in the scorching Barcelona heat, crossing the finish line ahead of Russell and Lando Norris. This landmark triumph broke a 686-day win drought for Hamilton, secured his 106th career victory, and made him the first British driver to win a main Grand Prix for Ferrari since Eddie Irvine in 1999

#formula1 #f1memes #lewishamilton #scuderiaferrari #hamilton

author: dailyf1center

caption:
The Kardashian curse and Ferrari curse canceled each other out

——————
The pairing of Formula 1 icon Lewis Hamilton and reality star Kim Kardashian has sparked a wave of viral theories that two of pop culture’s most infamous hexes—the “Kardashian curse” and the “Ferrari curse”—are actively canceling each other out. For years, fans jokingly blamed the Kardashian curse for the career slumps of athletes who dated into the family, while motorsport enthusiasts equally dreaded the “Ferrari curse” of strategic blunders and inconsistent machinery that plagued the Scuderia. However, following their public relationship launch, Hamilton shattered expectations during the Monaco Grand Prix weekend. With Kardashian cheering from the Ferrari garage, Hamilton powered through to a stellar second-place finish. The internet quickly dubbed this phenomenon a real-world “Reverse Curse Technique”, jokingly proving that multiplying two negatives can sometimes create a podium-finishing positive.

#formula1 #f1memes #lewishamilton #kimkardashian #f1

author: motorsportcom

caption:
Russell loses P2 in the standings 🥶

————-
Following the 2026 Monaco Grand Prix, Lewis Hamilton successfully overtook his former teammate George Russell to claim P2 in the Drivers’ Championship standings. Driving for Scuderia Ferrari, Hamilton secured back-to-back second-place finishes in Canada and Monaco, elevating his total to 90 points. Meanwhile, a rough weekend in Monte Carlo saw Russell hit with multiple penalties, slumping his Mercedes down to 88 points and dropping him to third place in the championship hunt. While both trail championship leader Kimi Antonelli, Hamilton’s resurgence has officially shifted the momentum of the season’s battle for the runner-up spot.

#formula1 #f1memes #lewishamilton #georgerussell #f1

author: f1humor.official

caption:
He should try anything  at this point 😂

———
Following his reflective visit to Ayrton Senna’s final resting place, Andrea Kimi Antonelli unlocked an extraordinary tier of performance that altered the course of his rookie campaign. Over the subsequent ten Grands Prix, the young Mercedes driver channeled his racing hero to secure an astonishing eight podiums and five victories, including a historic Grand Slam triumph at Monaco. This relentless surge of form not only vindicated Mercedes’ immense faith in his talent but also cemented his status as a legitimate championship contender driving with the inspired spirit of a legend.
#formula1 #f1memes #kimiantonelli #georgerussell #f1
